# Third-Party Dependencies

## GoogleTest

- Upstream: https://github.com/google/googletest
- Version: `v1.17.0`
- Commit: `52eb8108c5bdec04579160ae17225d66034bd723`
- License: BSD 3-Clause (`google_test/LICENSE`)

The upstream source is stored in `google_test` and must remain unmodified.
Project-specific integration belongs in the project's own CMake files.
